roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC849,5 MOTION TO CORRECT CRIMINAL HISTORY RECORD FILED

/CAL: DEF 849,5PC MOTION/NP/MO GRTD/CTORD: THE PETITIONER'S RECORD OF THE ARREST BY THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT IN THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SHOW THIS WAS NOT AN ARREST BUT A DETENTION ONLY ,/X: ORDER DECLARING THE MATTER A DETENTION ONLY SIGNED AND FILED,/
/CAL:DEFENDANT'S PC 849,5 MOTION/X:849,5 MOTION IS GRANTED,/X:ORDER SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT,/
